layout.siteTitle: Paws of Hope — Stray Animal Care
layout.siteDescription: Helping stray animals find care, treatment, and loving homes.

meta.title: Paws of Hope — Hope for Stray Animals
meta.description: Helping stray animals find care, treatment, and loving homes.

hero.headline:
ONE HUMAN.
THOUSANDS
OF LIVES.
hero.description: A systematic rescue operation on the streets of Istanbul. Every life is a breath, every breath a recorded hope. Not just feeding — rehabilitating and finding permanent homes.
hero.quoteText: Saving one doesn't change the world. But it changes the world for that one.

featured.emergencyTicker: EMERGENCY RESPONSE NEEDED /// CLINIC SUPPORT REQUIRED /// HELP NOW

support.title: How Can You Help?
support.suppliesPlaceholder: Coming soon — check back for needed supplies.

story.missionText: Our mission is clear: to reach cases requiring urgent medical intervention immediately, to control the street population through ethical methods, and to be a safe shelter until permanent homes are found.
story.originParagraph1: It all started on a cold winter night in 2019, with an injured cat shivering at my doorstep. I took her to the vet, got her treated, and that night I realized — this wasn't just a cat, it was a responsibility.
story.originParagraph2: Since that day, we've rescued hundreds of lives. Each story is different, but they all share one thing: all it takes is someone willing to care.
story.originQuote: Saving one doesn't change the world. But it changes the world for that one.
story.timeline2019: First rescue — the injured cat at the doorstep
story.timeline2024: NGO application filed, international support network
story.feedingDescription: We provide regular feeding at 40+ stations daily. Hot food and water during winter months.
story.treatmentDescription: We cover all veterinary costs for sick and injured stray animals.
story.shelterDescription: We place recovered animals in safe, loving permanent homes.

meta.title: Donate — Paws of Hope
meta.description: Support stray animals with a donation. We accept donations via IBAN, PayPal, and Wise.

donate.title: Donate
donate.subtitle: Every contribution brings hope to an animal in need.

vet.title: Vet Visit
vet.description: Covers a routine checkup and vaccination.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: All donations go directly to animal care, treatment, and food costs. You can see detailed spending in our transparency reports.
faq.q2: Can I get a donation receipt?
faq.a2: For a receipt, please contact us via email or WhatsApp.
faq.q3: Can I make a recurring donation?
faq.a3: Yes! You can set up a standing bank order for monthly donations.
faq.a4: Yes, we accept international donations via PayPal and Wise.
faq.q5: Can I donate supplies instead of money?
faq.a5: Yes! Contact us for our needs list. We accept food, litter, medicine, and blankets.

transparency.title: Transparent Management
transparency.description: We regularly publish all income and expenses. You can always see where your donations go.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I become a volunteer?
faq.a1: Simply contact us via WhatsApp. We'll find the right area for you together.
faq.q2: Do I need experience to volunteer?
faq.a2: No experience needed. Your love for animals is enough! We provide the necessary training.
faq.q3: How much time do I need to commit?
faq.a3: It's entirely up to you. Even a few hours a week makes a big difference.
faq.q4: What do I need at home for foster care?
faq.a4: We cover the essentials (food, litter, medicine). All we ask for is your love and attention.

association.title: Our Goal: Official NGO Status
association.description: We aim to establish an official association to operate under a legal framework, increase our fundraising capacity, and reach more animals in need.

shelter.title: Fully Equipped Shelter
shelter.description: Build a safe and equipped shelter for animals during treatment.

spay.title: 200+ Spay/Neuter
spay.description: Spay/neuter at least 200 animals per year for population control.

volunteers.title: 50 Active Volunteers
volunteers.description: Expand our volunteer network to reach 50 active volunteers.

clinic.title: Veterinary Clinic Partnership
clinic.description: Establish permanent partnerships with vet clinics for discounted treatments.

ngo.title: Official NGO Status
ngo.description: Establish a legal association for a transparent and sustainable structure.

vetClinic.title: Community-Funded Clinic
vetClinic.description: Open a veterinary clinic dedicated to stray animals, funded by our donors.

foster.title: City-Wide Foster Network
foster.description: Create a comprehensive foster care network with volunteers in every neighborhood.

awareness.title: National Awareness Campaign
awareness.description: Organize national awareness campaigns for stray animal rights.

network.title: Our Growing Volunteer Network
network.description: With our growing volunteer family, we reach more animals every day. Be part of this change.
